allow: Bash(node -e "const { YoutubeTranscript } = require\(''youtube-transcript''\); YoutubeTranscript.fetchTranscript\(''L9pDQRaRkns''\).then\(r => console.log\(''OK'', r.slice\(0,2\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERR'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''youtube-transcript''\).then\(m => { console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\); const YT = m.YoutubeTranscript || m.default; return YT.fetchTranscript\(''L9pDQRaRkns''\); }\).then\(r => console.log\(''OK'', JSON.stringify\(r.slice\(0,2\)\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERR'', e.message\)\)")
